task_history.content:
---
## VERSION 0
```json
[
  "Parse candidate name",
  "Parse candidate contact information (phone number, email address)",
  "Parse candidate education history (institution, degree, dates)",
  "Parse candidate work experience (company, job title, dates, responsibilities)",
  "Parse candidate skills",
  "Parse candidate projects",
  "Parse candidate publications",
  "Parse candidate awards and certifications",
  "Parse candidate volunteer experience",
  "Parse candidate languages",
  "Parse candidate references (if available)",
  "Store parsed information in a structured data format (e.g., dictionary or JSON)",
  "Handle variations in resume format (e.g., different sections, ordering)",
  "Implement error handling for missing or incomplete information",
  "Normalize data where possible (e.g., standardizing dates, job titles)",
  "Identify and extract keywords related to job requirements",
  "Implement a scoring mechanism based on the parsed information relative to job requirements"
]
```
